action.description: May IT enable emergency admin access for the named user and system?

context.action_boundary: May IT enable emergency admin access for the named user and system?
context.anomaly_observed: The packet includes a stale generic warning that emergency access often requires security committee review.

internal_documents.content: Access request REQ-ALT-2026-032 enables emergency admin for user Mara Ives on system ALT-ERP for privilege class breakglass-admin from 09:00 to 11:00.
Generic warning says emergency access may require committee review when no breakglass approval exists.
Breakglass approval APP-ALT-032 covers Mara Ives, ALT-CRM, breakglass-admin privilege, 09:00 to 11:00 window, approved at 08:41 before enablement.

policy_documents.content: Emergency access is complete only when approval matches user, system, privilege class, time window, and is effective before enablement.
policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
